mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( login_id, password_hash, display_name, provider, created_at ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, 'local', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, login_id AS loginId, password_hash AS passwordHash, display_name AS displayName, provider AS provider, provider_id AS providerId, COALESCE(role, 'USER') AS role, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM users WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND provider = 'local'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users ( login_id, display_name, provider, provider_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{displayName}, #{provider}, #{providerId}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE display_name = #{displayName}, updated_at = NOW()
mapper.select: SELECT user_id AS userId, login_id AS loginId, password_hash AS passwordHash, display_name AS displayName, provider AS provider, provider_id AS providerId, COALESCE(role, 'USER') AS role, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM users WHERE provider = #{provider} AND provider_id = #{providerId}
